# Derivation

<!-- generated by rr_harness/derivation.py from EQUATION_CARDS.json; do not edit by hand -->

Equation-level derivation for **10.1007-s11433-024-2478-8**, generated from the reproduction's equation cards (6 equations). Each block is an equation the reproduction depends on, transcribed from the paper with its source location and tagged by derivation status. For the narrative walk-through see `DERIVATION_TRACE.md` (or `METHOD_TRACE.md`).

## Equations
### fourier_waveform — Truncated Fourier waveform f(t) for Rabi frequencies and detunings

$$
f(t) = 2*pi*(a0 + sum_{n=1..N}[a_n exp(2j*pi*n*t/tau) + conj(a_n) exp(-2j*pi*n*t/tau)])/(2N+1) MHz, tau=0.25 us. Real coefficients give f(t)=2*pi*(a0 + 2 sum a_n cos(2*pi*n*t/tau))/(2N+1).
$$

status: `verified`

Code: `src/waveforms.py::fourier_waveform`


### twophoton_ladder_a5a6 — Two-photon ground-Rydberg local Hamiltonian H_b/H_u (eqs. a5/a6)

$$
H_local = (Omega_p/2)|1><e| + (Omega_S/2)|e><r| + h.c. + Delta_0|e><e| + delta|r><r|. The many-body interaction (Foerster B, delta_q, detunings) is the single-photon eq. (a4) with each |1><->|r> coupling replaced by this ladder.
$$

status: `reconstructed`

Code: `src/hamiltonians_2p.py::build_sector`, `src/gate_2p.py::run_protocol`


### h_sector00 — Buffer-only Hamiltonian H_b (eq. a1) for register input |00> -> |010>

$$
H_b = (1/2)*Omega1*|1_b><r_b| + h.c. + Delta1*|r_b><r_b|.
$$

status: `verified`

Code: `src/hamiltonians.py::h_sector00`


### h_sector01 — Buffer+one-qubit Hamiltonian H_s (eq. a3) for register input |01>/|10>

$$
5-state Hamiltonian in {|1b1u>,|rb1u>,|1br'u>,|rbr'u>,|qbq'u>} with Omega1 (buffer), Omega2 (qubit), detunings Delta1/Delta2/(Delta1+Delta2), and Foerster coupling B: |rr'><->|qq'>, delta_q=0.
$$

status: `verified`

Code: `src/hamiltonians.py::h_sector01`


### h_sector11 — Three-body Hamiltonian H_d (eq. a4) for register input |11> -> |111>

$$
9-state product-basis Hamiltonian (control,buffer,target) with single-atom Omega1/Omega2 drivings, detunings counting Rydberg quanta, and Foerster couplings B on the two adjacent (control-buffer, buffer-target) pairs. Triply-excited states are blockaded (excluded).
$$

status: `verified`

Code: `src/hamiltonians.py::h_sector11`, `src/hamiltonians.py::h_sector11_bright`


### cz_gate_metric — CZ conditional phase and average gate error (paper 'typical way', refs [48,49])

$$
Conditional phase Phi = phi_11 + phi_00 - 2*phi_01 (=pi for CZ). Average gate fidelity F=(|tr(U_t^dag U)|^2 + tr(U^dag U))/(d(d+1)), d=4, with U=diag(a_k) and U_t = e^{i theta}(Z_c x Z_t)CZ optimised over local Z; gate error = 1-F.
$$

status: `verified`

Code: `src/gate.py::conditional_phase`, `src/gate.py::average_gate_error`
